narrative:
Amberley B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 873 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
